overview.title: Overview
overview.lead: Choose a section in the sidebar to edit site content.

heroSlider.title: Hero slider
heroSlider.desc: Home hero images and headline / copy for English, Arabic, and German.

aboutSection.title: About section
aboutSection.desc: Discover / Our story — image and copy in EN, AR, and DE.

servicesSection.title: Services section
servicesSection.desc: Home services block — heading and three cards in EN, AR, and DE.

menuPreview.title: Menu preview (home)
menuPreview.desc: Our Menu section — four images and copy in EN, AR, and DE.

menuPage.title: Menu page (/menu)
menuPage.desc: Categories, dishes, hero and breadcrumbs — same layout as the public menu page.

counter.title: Numbers (counter)
counter.desc: Home stats block — background, heading, and four counters in EN, AR, and DE.

bestSellers.title: Best sellers (home)
bestSellers.desc: Four featured products — images, prices, and copy in EN, AR, and DE.

products.title: Discover / Our products (home)
products.desc: Product tabs (max 4), three items per tab, headings and copy in EN, AR, and DE.

blog.title: Blog articles
blog.desc: Add, edit, and delete posts in EN, AR, and DE — rich text body with emoji bar.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.desc: Full gallery pool, uploads, and the four home teaser images.

contact.title: Contact & location
contact.desc: Phone, WhatsApp, address, hours, map, email, and social links for the site chrome.

errors.config: AUTH_SECRET is missing or too short (min 16 characters). Check server configuration.

shared.title: Title
shared.fourCountersHint: Four counters (fixed order). Value is a number; suffix is optional text after the number (e.g. +).
shared.uploadReplaceHint: Replacing an uploaded file removes the previous file under /uploads/ on save. Built-in /images/ paths are left on disk.
shared.imageHintRequired: Required — used in the 2×2 grid on the home page.
shared.hoursHint: Use line breaks between weekday and weekend blocks if you like.
shared.hoursPlaceholder:
Monday to Friday from 08:00 am to 06:00 pm
Saturday and Sunday from 09:00 am to 05:00 pm
shared.headingsLead: Subheading, title, and lead for each language (English, Arabic, and German).
shared.productImageHint: Clear to fall back to the default bundled image on save.
shared.productFormIntro: Image, price, and name/description per language. Replacing an upload removes the old file under /uploads/ when you save.
shared.name: Name
shared.coverHint: Shown on cards and in the article header.
shared.addGalleryHint: After upload completes, the image is appended to the gallery.
shared.replaceSlotHint: Upload a file to replace this image.
shared.uploadSectionImageHint: Upload replaces the image path. Previous files under /uploads/ are removed on save when replaced.
shared.embedHelp: Use only the Embed a map URL from Google Maps (Share → Embed a map). Normal /maps/place links are blocked in iframes (X-Frame-Options). Leave empty to use latitude / longitude instead.
shared.addProductTabHint: Up to 4 tabs. The internal id is derived from the English title when possible; three product slots are created with default images (edit each product in its own modal).
shared.deleteTabConfirm: Delete this tab and its three products? Uploaded images under /uploads/ will be removed when safe.

upload.dropPrompt: Drop a file here or click to choose
upload.formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or PDF. Images are compressed on the server; stored file must be ≤ 10 MB (larger originals allowed up to the server limit).
upload.outputTooLarge: The file is still larger than 10 MB after processing. Try a smaller or simpler image.
upload.rawTooLarge: This file is too large to upload (server safety limit).
upload.invalidImage: Could not read or compress this image. Try another format or file.

heroSlider.title: Hero slider
heroSlider.lead: Background image plus headline and body copy per language. Changes apply to the home page after save.
heroSlider.emptyTable: No slides yet. Add one or they will fall back to bundled defaults until you save.
heroSlider.heroImageHint: Images are saved under public/uploads. Replace by uploading again.

blog.title: Blog articles
blog.lead: Articles as cards. Edit in the modal — gallery images are uploaded files, not manual URLs.
blog.deleteConfirm: Delete article "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
blog.introRich: Title, date, excerpt, and rich body per language. Upload cover and gallery images from your device only (no manual URLs). Old /uploads/ files are removed when replaced on save.

menuPage.title: Menu page
menuPage.lead: Edit the hero, breadcrumbs, categories and dishes. The preview below uses the same components as the public /menu page.
menuPage.heroBgHint: Upload to replace. Previous file under /uploads/ is removed on save when replaced.
menuPage.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete this category and all its dishes?
menuPage.emptyCategory: No dishes yet — add at least one dish per category you want visible.

errors.categories: At least one category is required.
errors.categoryId: Each category needs an internal id.
errors.categoryTitle: Each category needs a title in at least one language.
errors.itemImage: Every dish must have an image.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.lead: Manage gallery images. Click the home icon: outline = not on home, filled = one of four home teasers (left-to-right order). Picking a fifth replaces the oldest pick. Removing from the pool also removes it from home if selected.
gallery.uploadHint: After upload it appears in the grid below.
gallery.emptyPool: No images in the pool yet — add images or keep the defaults.
gallery.homeOrderHint: Numbers on the image match the order on the home page (1→4).
gallery.errNeedFour: Turn on the home icon on four gallery images for the home page.
gallery.errMustBeInPool: Home images must be part of the current gallery pool.

about.title: About section
about.lead: “Discover / Our story” on the home page: image plus subheading, title, and body for English, Arabic, and German.

services.title: Services section
services.lead: “Why guests choose Latana” on the home page: section heading and three service cards — copy for English, Arabic, and German. Icons are fixed from the site template.

counter.title: Numbers (counter)
counter.lead: Home “Numbers / Latana in brief” block: background image, heading copy, and four stats (value, suffix, label) for English, Arabic, and German.
counter.bgImageHint: Replacing an upload removes the old file under /uploads/ on save.

menuPreview.title: Menu preview (home)
menuPreview.lead: “Our Menu” block on the home page: four images and all copy (including the PDF link label from common site messages) in English, Arabic, and German. The PDF file path still comes from site assets.

bestSellers.title: Best sellers (home)
bestSellers.lead: Live preview like the home page. Press Edit to open headings or any product in a modal.

products.title: Discover / Our products (home)
products.lead: Section headings in a separate modal; each tab has label editing and delete/reorder; each of the three products has its own modal. Max 4 tabs and 3 products per tab.

contact.title: Contact & location
contact.lead: Phone, WhatsApp, email, map coordinates, social profiles, and address / opening hours for each language. This data powers the intro bar under the hero, the footer, and the map section.

unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
unsaved.body: Your gallery edits are not saved yet. Save before leaving, discard them, or stay on this page.
